                  "content": "I'll wrap LeadShow content with a flex container, adding the AssociatedObjectsPanel as a right sidebar showing companies built from fetched organization data or inferred email domains, including the lead as contact and handling empty states gracefully.&lt;/details&gt;&lt;/think&gt;"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 11266,
                  "content": "    \"content\": \"/**\\r\\n * Lead Show/Detail Component\\r\\n * Displays detailed lead information with tabs for Score History and Events\\r\\n */\\r\\nimport { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';\\r\\nimport {\\r\\n  Show,\\r\\n  SimpleShowLayout,\\r\\n  TextField,\\r\\n  DateField,\\r\\n  FunctionField,\\r\\n  useRecordContext,\\r\\n  ReferenceField,\\r\\n  useNotify,\\r\\n  useDataProvider,\\r\\n} from 'react-admin';\\r\\nimport {\\r\\n  Box,\\r\\n  Card,\\r\\n  CardContent,\\r\\n  Typography,\\r\\n  Grid,\\r\\n  Chip,\\r\\n  Divider,\\r\\n  LinearProgress,\\r\\n  Tabs,\\r\\n  Tab,\\r\\n  Button,\\r\\n  CircularProgress,\\r\\n  Dialog,\\r\\n  DialogTitle,\\r\\n  DialogContent,\\r\\n  DialogActions,\\r\\n  TextField as MuiTextField,\\r\\n  IconButton,\\r\\n  Alert,\\r\\n} from '@mui/material';\\r\\nimport {\\r\\n  Email as EmailIcon,\\r\\n  Phone as PhoneIcon,\\r\\n  Business as BusinessIcon,\\r\\n  LinkedIn as LinkedInIcon,\\r\\n  CalendarToday as CalendarIcon,\\r\\n  Timeline as TimelineIcon,\\r\\n  Refresh as RefreshIcon,\\r\\n  Event as EventIcon,\\r\\n} fro [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 11278,

                {
                  "lineNumber": 11310,
                  "content": "        \"diffString\": \"      &amp;lt;Box sx={{ p: 3 }}&amp;gt;\\r\\n        &amp;lt;LeadHeader /&amp;gt;\\r\\n-       \\r\\n-       {/* Main Content */}\\r\\n-       &amp;lt;Grid container spacing={3}&amp;gt;\\r\\n-         {/* Left Column - Scores */}\\r\\n-         &amp;lt;Grid size={{ xs: 12, md: 4 }}&amp;gt;\\r\\n-           &amp;lt;Box sx={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 3 }}&amp;gt;\\r\\n-             &amp;lt;ScoreBreakdown /&amp;gt;\\r\\n-             &amp;lt;IntentSummary /&amp;gt;\\r\\n-             &amp;lt;ActivityComposer onActivityLogged={handleActivityLogged} /&amp;gt;\\r\\n-             &amp;lt;NotesList refreshKey={notesRefreshKey} /&amp;gt;\\r\\n-           &amp;lt;/Box&amp;gt;\\r\\n-         &amp;lt;/Grid&amp;gt;\\r\\n-         \\r\\n-         {/* Right Column - Tabs */}\\r\\n-         &amp;lt;Grid size={{ xs: 12, md: 8 }}&amp;gt;\\r\\n-           &amp;lt;Card&amp;gt;\\r\\n-             &amp;lt;Box sx={{ borderBottom: 1, borderColor: 'divider' }}&amp;gt;\\r\\n-               &amp;lt;Tabs\\r\\n-                 value={tabValue}\\r\\n-                 onChange={(_, newValue) =&amp;gt; setTabValue(newValue)}\\r\\n-  [... omitted end of long line]"
